# PERF-155 positive: handler internally checks r.Method
lang: go
file: PERF-155-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method == http.MethodGet {
		w.Write([]byte("get"))
	} else if r.Method == http.MethodPost {
		w.Write([]byte("post"))
	}
}
